pages.text:
NovaCloud Analytics Inc.

Period: Q4 2024

NovaCloud operates a B2B SaaS platform serving mid-market and enterprise digital businesses with analytics and observability
tooling.

Quarterly Operating Metrics

| Metric | Q4 2024 |
| --- | --- |
| Net Revenue(USD) | $7.2M |
| End-of-Period ARR | $29.1M |
| Logo Churn Rate(LTM) | 6.5% |
| Cash Balance | $24.0M |
| Monthly Net Burn | ($0.88M) |
| Cash Runway | ~27 months |
| Total Headcount | 128 |

Performance Commentary

Net Revenue of $7.2M in Q4 2024 represented an 11% increase over the prior quarter. Gross margin came in at 76%, a one-point
improvement versus Q3, reflecting continued cloud infrastructure efficiency gains. Net dollar retention on a trailing-twelve-month
basis reached 119% in Q4 2024, improving from 116% in Q3 2024, supported by strong expansion activity within existing
enterprise accounts. New logo additions totalled 11. Expansion revenue of $1.4M was the highest in the company's history to date.

Headcount of 128 at quarter-end reflects selective additions in product and infrastructure engineering. Commercial team headcount
remained flat as management evaluated the go-to-market organisational structure.

Key Risks

• ARR growth increasingly driven by expansion; new logo momentum remains below target.

• Infrastructure cost efficiency gains may plateau without further architectural investment.

• Enterprise sales cycle elongation observed in Q4; average deal time up approximately 15 days.

(1) Net Revenue is equivalent to Recognized Revenue in prior periods; terminology updated for board reporting.

(2) Gross Margin and Net Dollar Retention are discussed in the commentary section; not separately tabled.

(3) Logo Churn is on a last-twelve-months (LTM) basis.
